reviews.review_description:
Museum Multiverse is a captivating experience from the moment it begins. Following the story of JR, a kid who has found himself in a strange museum rife with secrets, hidden dimensions, and a looming presence you must evade throughout the game. In this way the experience is thrilling and relaxed at the same time. Innovations in this game, such as the 3rd person view and the inclusion of meticulously crafted 360 videos kick the experience up a notch. 

For indie games on Quest, this is a unique diamond in the rough. The story keeps you hooked, the gameplay is dynamic from level to level, and the creative energy of its creators bleeds through every aspect of the game, nothing is "bland". In fact, story is the main driver of the experience. 

I hope you enjoy the game as much as I have, it's more than worth its value in my honest opinion.
Museum Multiverse was a lot of fun. I liked the art direction, the different play styles and homage to side scrolling. Would love to see some expansions!! Keep it up!
Quite lovely. Tremendous. Visceral and surpasses expectation. Accolades.

Museum Multiverse is dope. Yeah, it’s a little rough around the edges, but the way it switches up gameplay is wild. You start thinking it’s a 3D platformer, then boom—it changes on you in a way I’ve never seen before. Each world feels unique, like stepping into a painting. Some parts could be smoother, but overall, it’s a super creative and fun experience. Definitely worth checking out if you like platformers with a twist!

Hey everyone, this is Hessvacio, creator and developer of Museum Multiverse.
I will actively be updating my game to make it earn my 5 star! 
Believe it 🥷
I hope you all enjoy my little passion project, and you for supporting a lil indie out here 🙏🏾
This is a real gem! The craftsmanship the attention to detail is incredible. You can tell the developer is a veteran and has a full grasp ￼of the medium. Straight 🔥
